delete.description: Allow a logged-in user to (soft) delete their own account. It requires a valid JWT token

500.description: Internal server error: Failed to delete account

post.description: Authenticate a user and return a JWT
Create a new user account bound to a specific tenant

400.description: Bad request: Invalid request body or validation failed

409.description: Conflict: User already exists in the specified tenant

get.description: Retrieve a list of exams with pagination support

post.description: Add a new exam to the system under the current tenant

get.description: Retrieve the current state of a specific session.

404.description: Not found: Session does not exist

post.description: Submit user answers and finalize the session, protected by Redis lock to prevent double-submissions

403.description: Forbidden: Unauthorized to submit this session

409.description: Conflict: Already submitted or being processed

get.description: Fetch a list of sessions/attempts the current user has made for a given exam
get.summary: List my attempts for an exam

post.description: Create a new attempt for a specific exam

403.description: Forbidden: User cannot start session (in example, max attempts reached)

409.description: Conflict: An active session already exists

get.description: Teachers get correct answers, students get cached sanitized versions

put.description: Update an exam's details by its ID

get.description: Retrieve analytics data for an exam (in example: average score, completion rate).
Fetch questions belonging to the tenant, exclude correct answers depending on logic

post.description: Add a new abstract syntax tree (AST) question (teacher/admin only)
Upload an array of questions simultaneously

404.description: Not found: Question does not exist

put.description: Modify an existing question's details by ID

get.description: Retrieve a list of all organizations

post.description: Add a new organization to the system

409.description: Tenant already exists or database error

get.description: Retrieve a single organization by its unique identifier

put.description: Update a tenant by ID with the provided JSON payload and return the updated record.

400.description: Bad request: Invalid payload or update failed
